title: anthemis cretica subsp. cinerea
intro: Anthemis cretica subsp. cinerea, also known as white yarrow, is a subspecies of the Anthemis cretica plant, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Anthemis cretica subsp. cinerea include relieving menstrual cramps, reducing fever, and soothing digestive issues. It can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to calm and soothe the body, particularly for women experiencing menstrual symptoms.
